{{Quote|Though this starfighter is fast and maneuverable, its light frame and exposed droid control computer make it easy to destroy|Droid Starfighter DFS-4CT flavour text|<ref name="Attack of the Clones (TCG)">{{TCG|set=Attack of the Clones|cardname=Droid Starfighter DFS-4CT}}</ref>}}
'''DFS-4CT''' was the designation of a [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture''-class starfighter]] in the service of the [[Confederate Navy/Legends|navy]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].
